sections.heading: PCB Manufacturing tolerances
sections.text: PCB Manufacturing tolerances PCBWay provides you below with the required in-house tolerance guidelines to ensure quality manufacturing of your printed circuit boards. Adhering to these tolerances will allow for proper manufacturing of your PCBs. Within these parameters, there is enough variation to allow us to manufacture the board and then also for it to work properly in your application. If you have any questions or want to discuss unique requirements, please call contact your customer service. Items Manufacturing Capabilities Remarks Number of Layers 1-10 layers For orders above 10 layers, please contact our sales rep.
